attacking_style: Not an attacker in traditional sense. Specialized time trial engine who leads TTT efforts and sets early benchmarks in individual TTs before being overtaken by pure specialists on varied terrain.
team_tactics: Deployed as TTT locomotive and early-stage TT benchmark setter. Team optimizes aero equipment specifically for his domestique TT role, maximizing marginal gains for non-GC riders.
terrain_preference: Excels on flat, pure power TTT courses. Track cycling background translates to high-speed flat efforts (54kph benchmarks). Struggles on mixed terrain TT parcours with technical/climbing sections.
vulnerability: Mixed terrain time trials expose limitations—sets early benchmarks but consistently superseded. Pure climbing efforts beyond domestique duties not in tactical repertoire.
key_patterns: TTT specialist across multiple Grand Tours and stage races, leading team efforts (3 observations)
Sets early TT benchmarks at high speeds before specialists overtake on varied terrain (2 observations)
Team invests in aero optimization for his domestique TT capability specifically (2 observations)
Track cycling background enables exceptional flat power but limited climbing versatility (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 shows continued TTT strength but role remains specialized domestique rather than individual progression
